tasks.subject: Task 0: Create edit_operations table migration and ledger helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New per-site edit_operations table + ensure-helper for synchronous undo ledger.

**Files:**
- Create: frontend/db-migrations/unified-measurements-migrations/54_create_edit_operations.sql
- Create: frontend/config/editoperations.ts
- Create: frontend/config/editoperations.test.ts

**Verify:** cd frontend && npm run test:unit -- editoperations

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/db-migrations/unified-measurements-migrations/54_create_edit_operations.sql", "frontend/config/editoperations.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run test:unit -- editoperations", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Idempotent migration", "Ledger helpers exported", "Revertable flag supports audit-only bulk revision rows", "Integration tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Shared types, field allowlist, plan hash
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single foundation module consumed by every other task.

**Files:**
- frontend/config/editplan/types.ts
- frontend/config/editplan/fieldpolicy.ts
- frontend/config/editplan/planhash.ts (+ tests)

**Verify:** cd frontend && npm run test:unit -- config/editplan/planhash config/editplan/fieldpolicy

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/config/editplan/types.ts", "frontend/config/editplan/fieldpolicy.ts", "frontend/config/editplan/planhash.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run test:unit -- config/editplan/planhash config/editplan/fieldpolicy", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Types exported", "Field policy with allowlist/clear-semantics", "UI/API field aliases canonicalize before allowlist", "InvalidClearError rejects blank identity fields", "Plan hasher deterministic for nested BulkEditPlan row plans and sorted reference arrays"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Apply helper skeleton (lock wrapper, transactional primitive, drift check, ledger writer)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Orchestrator for preview-driven apply with a public single-row wrapper and a lower-level transactional primitive for batch callers.

**Files:**
- frontend/config/editplan/apply.ts (+ test)

**Verify:** cd frontend && npm run test:unit -- config/editplan/apply

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/config/editplan/apply.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run test:unit -- config/editplan/apply", "acceptanceCriteria": ["applyEdit owns lock and transaction", "applyEditInTransaction never begins/commits/acquires lock", "Hash drift", "Ledger written in provided transaction", "Batch callers must not loop over applyEdit"]}
```
